data.author: Lemileo

data.title: I wish I could give more
data.content:
This app is okay, but I was disappointed with my overall experience. After a few days of use, I noticed that many of the affirmations felt repetitive often the same messages, just slightly reworded. This was especially frustrating because I selected multiple affirmation categories during sign-up and expected more variety.

What really upset me was the billing. I signed up for the 3-day free trial, but I was charged $65 before the trial period had ended. I immediately requested a refund through Apple, but my request was denied. I also contacted the app’s support team directly. While they responded and were polite, they ultimately told me there was nothing they could do.

Had this issue been resolved, I would have given a higher rating. However, being charged $65 before my trial was over and receiving no refund left me feeling taken advantage of. For that reason, I’m leaving a one-star review. If I could leave zero stars, I would. $65 is a significant amount of money, especially for an app that repeatedly shows similar affirmations.

Unfortunately, this experience felt more focused on making money than providing value to users.

Much easier to delete the Ap.

data.author: suzanneh64

data.title: I almost never write reviews on apps
data.content: … but honestly. I had to try something to change my daily mindset and now here I am. I’ve always heard that affirmations were good for your psyche. I’m a huge mental and emotional health advocate, as most of us here probably are. I’ve been told and read many years that SPEAKING your affirmations make a difference. It’s also part of various ancient cultures and ideologies rooted back in early human linguistics and consciousness. So I tried it. I put the widget on my lock screen and updated it to refresh hourly, and I speak them out loud every time I look at my phone for the time or unlock it for use. I didn’t FEEL an instant change, but over the last few weeks, I feel lighter, more focused, more in control of myself and more in tune with my reality. If I could give 20 stars I would. For what I know of the connections of ancient linguistics and consciousness ideologies, this app is perfect. Absolutely perfect.
data.author: WifeyVasquez

data.title: A beautiful reminder
data.content:
I love I Am. I have been using it for years. 
It’s a nice app to have on my phone to be reminded of the small things in life that make all the difference. 
I love my little reminders and positive affirmations. 
However my latest affirmations haven’t felt very intentional or there has been some sort of shift because sentences like “I am still here” or “it’s okay if today was just survival. That counts”. Don’t sound like affirmations to me 🫠
They shift all the time though and maybe it’s picking up the energy of my environment. Because I never noticed them being more on the negative side in the desert until I came to the city 🙃
data.author: bubblebath records

data.title: Not the same
data.content: This app used to have customizable options without you being prompted to buy a membership. Now you’re being forced to purchase it just to have a simple background. It’s not what it used to be.
data.author: axjxnell

data.title: Utterly
data.content: The best and most motivating app I’ve ever used. I use the free version and I am beyond happy with it.
data.author: Simp_eater99

data.title: Love it
data.content: I love this app
data.author: 2134&kit

data.title: Invaluable and
data.content: Life changing
data.author: Shrisava

data.title: Confident
data.content: Today is the first day out of my 3 day trial and so far confident the app will help guide me
data.author: PureGrowth

data.title: DO NOT DOWNLOAD THIS APP: Creates an alarm that can’t be deleted
data.content: DO NOT DOWNLOAD THIS APP: This app made an alarm that goes off daily that cannot be turned off. It’s not under alarms or listed in the app. I have attempted to look up how to delete it and it’s just mysteriously somewhere in my phone and can’t be removed.
data.author: Cacarebear

data.title: Trying to cancel before being charged
data.content:
Sneaky app says it will notify you befor charging 
Not so
data.author: Dr.MacD

data.title: So expensive, charged me unfairly
data.content: I like this app but it charged me even after i cancelled the free trial! why isn’t there an option to continue through the app for only the free version?? how do i get a refund?? I can’t afford to lose 50 dollars for this.. i’ve contacted my bank already
data.author: simoneee888

data.title: Empowering
data.content: I really love this app. It helps me to stay positive, focused & encouraged about myself. Love the reminders & practices.
data.author: Peaceful365

data.title: Relax
data.content: I am who I am because of “I am.”.  I am so relaxed and at peace. No pressure!❤️🙏🏾
data.author: greatleaderruth

data.title: Sound isn’t working
data.content: Still haven’t updated app
data.author: chrissjers

data.title: Life Changer
data.content: This app has fueled and helped my spiritual journey during homelessness. I can only explain it as a life charger, once you start and stay consistent your mind shifts and begins to believe and create it! Just do it man
data.author: TheeLadyQueen

data.title: New update
data.content: I love this app and have used it for years, but I am not loving the new update. I preferred when I could just pick a topic and that was what would show up. I also made the mistake of clicking on affirmations for May. It is now June and I’m still getting affirmations from May which annoys me.
data.author: jesav

data.title: Daily reminder to keep believing in yourself!
data.content:
Love this app! Simple yet powerful affirmations.  I appreciate all of the personalization options.  I’m able to fine tune and make it completely relevant to my needs.  Definitely recommend for daily living as well as support through life’s challenges. 
Developers: keep up the great work!
data.author: Taggs AM

data.title: Says they remind before 3 day trial end but doesn’t.
data.content: I thought this app was ok. Not sure I’d spend that much on it. I was most disappointed when I was told I’d have reminders sent to me before the trail ends and I’m charged. Needless to say that was not what happened. I just now saw the toggle that I have to turn on myself to be reminded before trail ends. And I also didn’t know Apple sends a pending charge 24 hrs before the trial ends so they are already trying to charge me before the 3 day trial is up.
data.author: Ashlima8615

data.title: I am sad it cost money but I get why
data.content: Good app
data.author: Chatbritt2002

data.title: Amazing and powerful
data.content:
This app is amazing! I am a very picky. Virgo and I am so impressed with not just all the great affirmations. But all the options, including background/wallpaper, sharing to social Media and friends, the daily practice, they read it out loud if you want. But what’s more important and amazing to me as the fact that I, after using this for a month, have seen such a huge difference in my strength as a person, self-worth. I love it! And you will too.

it is *really* Worth the subscription!!
data.author: Kairaca

data.title: Good theory, way to many notifications
data.content:
The streak reminder is quite annoying and unnecessary and you get it every single day with no option to adjust notification type. 

But the app functions well.
data.author: Sez132
